title: Analysis settings
description: GitPulse separates data collection from interpretation when calculating signals.

filters.title: Repository scope
filters.description: Controls which repository content GitPulse should consider when reading Git history.
filters.excludedPathsHelp: Comma-separated paths to ignore when ranking changed files, for example: dist/, node_modules/, target/.
filters.defaultBranchHelp: Used as the preferred branch label for future branch-aware analysis. Current analysis reads the selected repository HEAD.

portable.title: Import and export
portable.description: Move GitPulse settings between machines or share them with a team.
portable.importFailed: Settings import failed. Check the JSON file and try again.
portable.messagePlaceholder: Settings stay local unless you export them.

repositoryMemory.title: Repository memory
repositoryMemory.description: Choose whether GitPulse should reopen the last repository after restart.

preview.title: Settings match preview
preview.description: Preview how the current repository settings map onto real Git history before running analysis again.
preview.excludedFilesEmpty: No changed files match the excluded paths in this window.
preview.bugKeywordCommitsDescription: Recent commits that match the current bug keywords.
preview.bugKeywordCommitsEmpty: No commits match the current bug keywords in this window.
preview.emergencyMatchesEmpty: No emergency pattern rows are available yet.
preview.emergencyCommitSamplesDescription: Recent commits that match each emergency pattern row.
preview.emergencyCommitSamplesEmpty: No emergency pattern commit samples are available yet.
preview.empty: Select a repository before previewing settings matches.
preview.nextStepDescription: Review these settings in Overview and refresh the analysis from there.

repositoryOverrides.title: Repository override
repositoryOverrides.description: Override selected analysis defaults for the current repository only.
repositoryOverrides.inheritDescription: This repository currently inherits the global defaults below.
repositoryOverrides.help: These values apply only to the selected repository. Empty rows still fall back to the global defaults.
repositoryOverrides.empty: Select a repository before setting repository-specific analysis defaults.
repositoryOverrides.enableHintDescription: Choose a repository in Overview first. Repository override settings are scoped to the currently selected repository.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used in the app.

defaults.title: Signal defaults
defaults.description: Default criteria used for initial Git analysis.
defaults.bugKeywordsHelp: Comma-separated. Used to count fix overlap in Hotspots.
defaults.emergencyPatternsHelp: Use commas for aliases in one row, for example: revert, reverted. The row signal is shared by every alias.

presets.title: Settings presets
presets.description: Apply a starting configuration for common repository shapes, then adjust the details below.
presets.appliedDefaults: {{preset}} preset was applied to the global defaults.
presets.appliedRepository: {{preset}} preset was applied to the current repository override.

webApp.label: Web app
webApp.title: Frontend or service UI
webApp.description: Shorter window, build output excluded, and release pressure patterns tuned for active product work.

library.label: Library
library.title: Package or SDK
library.description: Longer history, generated docs excluded, and compatibility-related fixes highlighted.

monorepo.label: Monorepo
monorepo.title: Multi-package repository
monorepo.description: Short signal window with broader build artifact exclusions for noisy repository roots.

cache.title: Cache and performance
cache.description: Analysis results are cached in memory while the app is running.
cache.databaseReady: Settings and analysis history are mirrored to the local database.
cache.databaseEmpty: Local database has not stored analysis data yet.
cache.retentionValue: Keep the latest {{runs}} analysis runs and {{cache}} cached analysis snapshots.
cache.databasePathUnavailable: Database path is not available in this runtime.
cache.logPathUnavailable: Log path is not available in this runtime.
cache.logPreviewEmpty: No log entries have been written yet.
cache.localQueryCache: Using local query cache for this session.
cache.openFolderFailed: Could not reveal the local database file.
cache.openLogFailed: Could not reveal the log file.
